A Safe Haven for Families Who Need a Break

Gabriel's Haven provides compassionate respite and support services for families raising children with autism and related developmental disabilities. You are not alone — we are here to help.

Request Services Today Learn More About Us

Understanding Respite

What Is Respite Care?

Compassionate Support for Your Family

Caring for a child with autism or other special needs is a full-time commitment filled with love, advocacy, and dedication. While incredibly rewarding, it can also be physically and emotionally demanding.

Respite care provides temporary, planned support that gives parents and caregivers the opportunity to rest, recharge, attend appointments, work, spend time with siblings, or simply take a well-deserved break — knowing their child is receiving safe, compassionate, and individualized care.

At Gabriel's Haven, we understand that trusting someone with your child is one of the biggest decisions you'll make. That's why we focus on building relationships, respecting your family's routines, and providing care tailored to your child's unique strengths, interests, and needs.

Whether you need a few hours to run errands, attend an appointment, enjoy a date night, or simply take time for yourself, we're here to provide dependable support so your family can thrive.

How Respite Care Can Help

Rest and Recharge

Take time to care for yourself so you can continue caring for those you love.

Attend Appointments

Schedule medical visits, therapy sessions, or personal appointments with peace of mind.

Focus on Work or Responsibilities

Take care of professional commitments or everyday tasks while your child receives attentive support.

Spend Time with Family

Enjoy one-on-one time with your spouse, partner, or other children.

Run Errands

Complete grocery shopping, household tasks, or simply enjoy a quiet moment to yourself.

Reduce Caregiver Stress

Regular respite helps prevent burnout and supports your emotional well-being.

Support Your Child's Growth

Children benefit from positive interactions, new experiences, and meaningful relationships with trusted caregivers.

Our Philosophy

At Gabriel's Haven, we believe respite care is about more than providing a break — it's about strengthening families.

When caregivers have the opportunity to rest and recharge, they return with renewed energy, patience, and confidence. By supporting caregivers, we help support the entire family.

We believe that caring for the caregiver is one of the most meaningful ways to care for the child.

💜 Because Caring for Yourself Matters

Every parent deserves the opportunity to pause, breathe, and recharge without guilt. At Gabriel's Haven, we're honored to provide the trusted support that helps make those moments possible.

OUR APPROACH

How We Support Your Family

Compassionate Care Tailored to Your Family's Needs

Every family is different, and so is every child. That's why our services are personalized to provide the support that works best for your family's unique routines, goals, and needs. Whether you need a few hours to recharge or ongoing support, Gabriel's Haven is here to help your family thrive.

💜

In-Home Respite Care

Compassionate, one-on-one support provided in the comfort and familiarity of your child's home, allowing caregivers time to rest, recharge, or attend to personal responsibilities.

🌟

Meaningful Engagement

We provide age-appropriate activities based on your child's interests, strengths, and developmental needs, helping create positive, enjoyable experiences while building confidence and connection.

Examples may include:

  • Arts and crafts
  • Reading together
  • Sensory-friendly activities
  • Games and puzzles
  • Outdoor play
  • Music and creative expression
🤝

Individualized Care

No two children are alike. We take the time to understand your child's routines, communication style, sensory preferences, interests, and support needs so every visit feels familiar, respectful, and personalized.

👨‍👩‍👧

Caregiver Relief

Sometimes the greatest gift is simply time. Whether you're attending appointments, focusing on work, running errands, spending time with siblings, enjoying a date night, or taking a much-needed break — we're here so you can do so with peace of mind.

💬

Family Partnership

We believe parents know their children best. We work alongside your family through open communication, consistent updates, and a collaborative approach that respects your goals, routines, and values.

Our Promise

At Gabriel's Haven, we don't just care for children — we support families. Every visit is guided by compassion, patience, respect, and a commitment to helping both children and caregivers feel seen, supported, and valued.

"Every family deserves a moment to breathe. Every caregiver deserves rest. Every child deserves to be cared for with love and expertise. That is the heart of Gabriel's Haven."

— Gabriel's Haven Founder

Why Families Choose Us

Why Gabriel's Haven?

We combine professional expertise with genuine compassion to deliver care your family can trust.

✓

Autism-Focused Expertise

Our caregivers are specifically trained in autism spectrum disorder and related developmental disabilities.

✓

Family-Centered Approach

We listen to your family's unique needs and create personalized care plans that work for you.

✓

Compassionate & Trustworthy

We treat every child and family with the same love and respect we would want for our own.

✓

Flexible Scheduling

We work around your schedule to provide support when you need it most — including evenings and weekends.

Our Story

Built From Love & Personal Experience

Gabriel's Haven was born from a deeply personal journey. As a parent of a child with autism, our founder understands firsthand the exhaustion, the love, the challenges, and the moments of pure joy that come with raising a child with special needs.

There were days when she desperately needed a break — not because she didn't love her child, but because she was running on empty. She searched for respite services and found that options were limited, often impersonal, and rarely designed with autism-specific needs in mind.

She knew there had to be a better way — a place where families could find not just temporary relief, but genuine support from people who truly understand. Gabriel's Haven is that place.

Our Services

Specialized Support for Every Family

Every service is delivered by trained, compassionate caregivers who understand the unique needs of children on the autism spectrum.

🏠

In-Home Respite Care

A trained caregiver comes to your home so your child stays in a familiar, comfortable environment while you take the break you need.

Community-Based Outings

Supervised, structured outings that help children develop social skills, explore their environment, and build confidence.

Family Support Services

Specialized Autism Support
